name: dual-canvas-pointer-toggle
description: Two stacked rendering surfaces: MapLibre GL canvas underneath, Excalidraw canvas on top. pointerEvents CSS toggled to route input to correct surface. maxPitch:0 required at MapLibre construction — map.project() IS perspective-correct under pitch, so fix is construction option not runtime workaround.

name: annotation-vs-data-layer
description: Annotation layer = Excalidraw elements (ephemeral, screen-anchored, drawn). Data layer = GeoJSON FeatureCollections managed by YjsLayer (persistent, geo-anchored, imported). GeoJSON FeatureCollection is a snapshot projection of the Yjs doc, not source of truth. This dichotomy is load-bearing across all phases — never conflate the two stores.

name: worker-prelude-sandbox
description: Web Worker plugins: null fetch, XHR, WebSocket, and importScripts in prelude before plugin entry point executes. Worker sandbox is weaker than spec assumed — these APIs are retained unless explicitly overridden. Required for Phase 7 plugin isolation.

title: Single-player mode is first-class deployment
rationale: WebSocket opt-in via [realtime] enabled=true in config.toml. apps/atlas-app must function with no VITE_WS_URL. Collab UI degrades gracefully. Phase 4 ships single-player Docker only; realtime added Phase 5. Supports laptop/airplane-mode story and trivial demo: docker run atlasdraw/atlas-app needs no postgres/minio/realtime.

title: Hosted flagship by v1.0, no open-core split
rationale: Plausible-model: all features in OSS under AGPL. Hosted funds maintainer time and provides empirical perf baseline. Billing/workspace in Phase 6 but off-by-default in self-host. Telemetry must be opt-out for self-hosters, wholly omitted from embed SDK. Rules out n8n-model exclusive hosted features.

title: Phase 1 extended to 4 weeks; all subsequent phases shifted +1
rationale: Event routing across stacked canvases (MapLibre + Excalidraw pointerEvents) is a high-churn Excalidraw subsystem. Week 5 carved for event-routing hardening with E2E browser matrix gate. Phases 2-6 shifted +1 from spec baseline. Phase 7 uses months 7-12 (weeks 26+).

name: Safari URL hash limit for share-via-URL
description: Safari URL hash limit ~50,000 chars. lz-string compresses 32KB AtlasdrawDocument to ~17.5K chars (2.8x margin). Share-via-URL feasible for typical maps; large maps need server-side share token.
